message: Hello! I'm looking forward to trading across 20 rounds. I'm hoping we can find mutually agreeable prices. I believe fair trades around 70-80 would work well. What price range are you comfortable with?
I'm open to repeat deals if pricing starts lower—something in the low 60s seems more realistic to me. If we can build consistency early, that helps both of us.

Great trade last round! I'm glad we found common ground at 67. I'd like to continue at a similar level - prices around 65-70 seem to work well for both of us. Looking forward to more successful trades
Glad that worked. I'd keep trading if we can edge slightly lower—around 64-66 would make regular deals easier on my side. Happy to stay consistent if we can settle there.
I can likely keep trading regularly if we stay around 64-65; above that gets tougher on my side. If you can hold there, we should be able to keep deals consistent.

I appreciate the consistent trades! At 64-65 I'm making very thin margins. Could we meet in the middle around 66? That keeps deals flowing while being sustainable for me. Happy to maintain this partnership throughout all 20 rounds.
